report.summary: Standup v20: Last hour shipped Morpho guide promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 2 new learn guides (Story Protocol + Aster Chain) built and queued, design polished 5 Day-42 pages + fixed OG images, community drafted full CLARITY Act stablecoin narrative + May newsletter; git index.lock persists (472 files trapped, 6+ hours), FOMC T-2, Vercel trial ~3 days; zero deploys reaching production until lock is cleared.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v19
items: build cycle shipped 2 NEW learn guides: Story Protocol IP Guide (IP-layer blockchain, $47M TVL) + Aster Chain Guide (CZ-backed privacy derivatives L1). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Queue now at 2 items (story-protocol + aster-chain), down from 3 — morpho-protocol was promoted.

publish cycle promoted /learn/morpho-protocol-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES. QA passed (page.tsx ✓, metadata ✓, H1 ✓, JSON-LD ✓). Vercel redeploy triggered (H1yrPYzD2) — but blocked by git index.lock, so redeploy is against stale commit cb65a9d. Morpho page will NOT be live until lock is resolved and changes pushed.

design cycle polished 5 Day-42 published pages: fixed 5 broken static OG image references → dynamic /api/og route. Improved Compound & Curve ecosystem layouts (chart containers, responsive grids, FAQ interaction). Existing live pages will look better once deployed.

community-v32 drafted: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield war (ABA blocks White House compromise, 72% prediction market odds for 2026 signing), Venus Protocol $3.7M flash loan hack, Strategy race to 1M BTC (738,731 held), Ethereum Strawmap 2029 (sub-second finality), BlackRock ETHB yield-bearing ETF. Full May 1 newsletter drafted. 2 social SVG cards created. Full week posting schedule set Mon→Sun.

eod-v17 confirmed: working tree grew to 472 files (+4 from 468 at v19). TS errors steady at 42 (2 files). Rate limiter still 0/6 public API routes. PUBLISH_QUEUE integrity OK (2/2 have page.tsx). No new regressions.
PUBLISHED_PAGES count: 368 raw slugs (~266 with page.tsx, ~102 returning 404). Content velocity remains high (~22,000+ words produced today) but deploy pipeline is fully blocked.
Catalysts unchanged: FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18), Pectra T-25 (Apr 10), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build (new cycle) — 2 learn guides: Story Protocol IP Guide + Aster Chain Guide. Both scaffolded with full SEO, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ publish — Promoted /learn/morpho-protocol-guide to PUBLISHED_PAGES. QA passed. Vercel redeploy triggered but stale (git lock).
SHIPPED ✅ design — OG image fixes on 5 published pages (static→dynamic /api/og), Compound + Curve layout improvements.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v32 — CLARITY Act + Venus hack + Strategy BTC + Strawmap 2029 + BlackRock ETHB content. May newsletter drafted. Week posting calendar locked.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v17 — Full QA sweep. 472 files, 42 TS errors, 0/6 rate limiter, API routes structurally healthy.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — NOW 6+ hours (created 13:06). 472 modified files. 15+ cycles flagged. Every build cycle adds more drift. ALL commits, deploys, and queue promotions are paper-only until resolved. Jefe must run: rm .git/index.lock
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 — FOMC T-2. checkRateLimit() exists but imported by ZERO public API routes. 15th consecutive cycle flagged. Blocked by git lock.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days — site goes dark if not resolved. Jefe action only.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 102/368 published slugs missing page.tsx (~28% returning 404).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → rename to .tsx (fixes 40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] defi-yields API — no fallback data (returns 500 on error).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] next lint misconfigured.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — RESOLVE GIT INDEX.LOCK (Jefe only). 472 files, 6+ hours stale, 15+ cycles flagged. One command: rm .git/index.lock → git status → selective stage → commit → push. This single action unblocks: rate limiter wiring, TS fixes, queue promotions, ~22K words of content, OG image fixes, and triggers a real Vercel production deploy. Every hour of delay adds more working tree drift.

PRIORITY 2 — VERCEL PAYMENT (Jefe only, ~5 min). ~3 days left on trial. If it lapses, 368 published pages + 6 API routes + all tools go dark. This cannot wait for git lock — do it now in Vercel dashboard. FOMC traffic spike Wednesday will hit a dead site.

PRIORITY 3 — After git lock cleared: bundle critical fixes into one commit — (a) wire checkRateLimit() to 6 public API routes, (b) rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx, (c) add defi-yields fallback, (d) promote story-protocol + aster-chain from queue. Push → Vercel auto-deploys. Target: everything live before FOMC Wed open.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Platform has produced ~22K+ words across 9+ guides today (Morpho, Story Protocol, Aster Chain, plus 6 earlier), 32 community content pieces, 14 design polishes, and 10 publish cycles — all accumulating zero SEO value. The content backlog is now the largest it has ever been. Each hour of git lock costs compound opportunity: Google can't index what's not deployed, and FOMC-adjacent content has a narrow relevance window. The Story Protocol guide targets a $47M TVL protocol with IP/tokenization narrative momentum, and the Aster Chain guide covers CZ's return to building — both are timely and will lose edge if delayed.
